mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_voucher_order (id, user_id, voucher_id, pay_type, status, create_time) VALUES
(#{order.id}, #{order.userId}, #{order.voucherId}, #{order.payType}, #{order.status}, #{order.createTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT user_id, voucher_id FROM tb_voucher_order WHERE (user_id, voucher_id) IN
(#{order.userId}, #{order.voucherId})
